title: Make acceptance evidence semantically scoped and add real execution proof
description: Replace Cartesian generic Testing evidence. Tracker acceptance is prose/untrusted; permit an item to reference only exact commands already authorized by controller-owned Testing config, or introduce a similarly explicit trusted per-item evidence mapping. Items without relevant configured evidence fail closed or require bounded human proof. Add a reproducible disposable scenario harness that exercises real tk plus real Pi subprocess supervision/worktree/artifacts/boundary/merge/close/cleanup without fake tracker/child scripts where feasible, and document live-model requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-item/generic true commands cannot certify unrelated acceptance; trusted command matching is item-scoped and injection-safe; qfs real disposable end-to-end execution is performed and evidence retained; tests pass.
